title: How a godly man handles temptation (it's not willpower)
caption:
A godly man doesn't run on willpower. He's governed. There's a difference.

Willpower collapses under pressure. Governance holds because it was built before the moment arrived.

Four moves that actually work — swipe to see them.

#faith #godlymen #christianmen #discipline #temptation #selfcontrol #bibleverses #manofgod #spiritualgrowth #christianliving
theme: He runs his life — his impulses don't control him.
